steps.title: Interpret f(4) using the given definition
steps.content: The function $f(t)$ represents the account balance $t$ years after the initial deposit. Therefore, $f(4)$ is the balance at $t = 4$, which is 4 years after the deposit.

steps.title: Translate the statement
steps.content: The statement $f(4) \approx 7,038.57$ means the account balance 4 years after the deposit is approximately 7,038.57 dollars. This is the total balance in the account, not a change from the initial amount.

steps.title: Identify the correct interpretation
steps.content: The value 7,038.57 is the total balance at $t = 4$ years, not an increase from the initial 6,500 (the actual increase is $7,038.57 - 6,500 = 538.57$). The correct answer correctly states that the balance is 7,038.57 after 4 years. That confirms A is correct.
